summary: P14: real run — config dry_run:false, pre-first-web-apply snapshot, parity harness green for >=2 sessions, ~20 tag batch, audit canary

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Preflight script shipped at guru-review/scripts/preflight.sh. Ran cleanly: canary matches manifest, parity harness green, pre-first-web-apply snapshot at ~/guru-backups/guru-20260425T191748Z-pre-first-web-apply.db. Remaining operator steps: (1) flip dry_run:false, (2) review ~20 tags on phone over tailscale, (3) tap Apply, (4) audit via the queries the preflight prints, (5) take post-first-web-apply snapshot. Ticket stays OPEN until those steps complete; umbrella also stays open.

resolution.note: Live spot-check from phone (ivy-android): 2 accepts applied to data/guru.db, 1 accept queued in review_actions. All canary deltas match expectations — staged_tags 15353→15351 pending and 18→20 accepted, edges 2548→2550 (both EXPRESSES, both proposed tier per score=1 rule), nodes unchanged at 2600 (concept targets pre-existing, COALESCE preserved their definitions). Reviewer attribution carried through to staged_tags.reviewed_by. Pre-first-web-apply snapshot taken at ~/guru-backups/guru-20260425T191748Z-pre-first-web-apply.db. Web tool produces CLI-equivalent rows on real data.
